theme: bugfix — offers schema drift + proposal wrapper leak
summary: snapshot-brand single-variant path wrote v1 flat offers[] (stamped _version 2.0). write-to-context wrapped _proposed/_source/_confidence at the root object when mode=proposed was used on a whole-file path. Both caught during fresh-instance test of v2.6.19.

changes.reason: Step 4 template rewritten in v2 offer_groups shape. Hard rules added: never mode=proposed on whole-file path; v2 offers only.
Guard added: mode=proposed without JSONPointer fragment is rejected with clear error.

operator_impact: preventive — existing drifted offers.json files need manual re-run of snapshot-brand to regenerate under v2 shape.
caught_by: onboarding test on nooance-paris (discovered masque-led-elite-x600/offers.json corruption)
known_gaps: No auto-migration for existing v1 offers files in live instances.
validate-resources does not yet detect the schema-shape + _version mismatch (candidate for next release).
